📝 How to Complete Your Assignment

To work on this assignment, open the following file in VS Code or your text editor:

pages/gallery/Assignment1.ts

Make your changes, save the file, and refresh this page to see your updated code.

🎯 To see your code in action: After completing the TODOs, run npm run build in your terminal, then click the green "See Your Code in Action!" button above!
